messages.subject: [OGRUG] Requeste of Assistance
messages.body_plain:
Dear Machado,
I think your doing well please i need your help for the question below:

?I would like to export this health accounts study in a standard comma-separated values file (.csv)/?importe csv?in with R?software.

?

The file ??Health Accounts Study.ptstudy?

Please support?
Francis D.

On Wednesday, November 23, 2022, 3:06 PM, Francis Djamba <dofrancis3 at yahoo.fr> wrote:

Dear Machado,
Thank you so much for your support !
Could you share with me your WhatsApp number.
Thanks advance
Francis D.
    Le mercredi 23 novembre 2022 ? 15:02:27 UTC+1, Machado, Tony (he, him | il, lui) (ISED/ISDE) <tony.machado at ised-isde.gc.ca> a ?crit :  
 
 #yiv6893524390 filtered {}#yiv6893524390 filtered {}#yiv6893524390 p.yiv6893524390MsoPlainText, #yiv6893524390 li.yiv6893524390MsoPlainText, #yiv6893524390 div.yiv6893524390MsoPlainText {margin:0cm;font-size:11.0pt;font-family:sans-serif;}#yiv6893524390 span.yiv6893524390PlainTextChar {font-family:sans-serif;}#yiv6893524390 .yiv6893524390MsoChpDefault {font-family:sans-serif;}#yiv6893524390 filtered {}#yiv6893524390 div.yiv6893524390WordSection1 {}
Hi Francis,
 
 ?
 
There's many ways to achieve this but here's one that seems to get the job done.
 
 ?
 

 
 ?
 
Cheers,
 
 ?
 
Tony Machado
 
(he; him | il;lui)

-----Original Message-----
From: R-UG-Ottawa <r-ug-ottawa-bounces at r-project.org> On Behalf Of Francis Djamba
Sent: November 22, 2022 7:48 AM
To: CRAN-submissions at R-project.org; r-ug-ottawa at r-project.org
Subject: Re: [OGRUG] Requeste of Assistance

 ?
 
Dears Colleagues;
 
 ?
 
I thank this message fund you well.
 
I would like to request your assistance to have an R script that will allow me to import data via a web link below and transpose the imported data and finally save the transposed data to a csv or xlsx file on my hard drive.
 
 ?
 
the Link:?https://can01.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Funstats.un.org%2Fsdgapi%2Fv1%2Fsdg%2FSeries%2FData%3FseriesCode%3DSL_DOM_TSPD&data=05%7C01%7Ctony.machado%40ised-isde.gc.ca%7C05b91dc2cf894f81eeeb08dacc87e2ba%7Cb72ac62f06d54cd5824eee92319a4676%7C0%7C0%7C638047653395171033%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJWIjoiMC4wLjAwMDAiLCJQIjoiV2luMzIiLCJBTiI6Ik1haWwiLCJXVCI6Mn0%3D%7C2000%7C%7C%7C&sdata=0hZESaPUc8CXoLFPjUuWKQlFhd0DE0Fg%2Bv1py%2FjyW6I%3D&reserved=0

Thank you for your help.
 

Francis D.?
